emptyState.title: Your space is empty
emptyState.body: Type your thoughts freely. Our AI will group, clean, and structure them for you.

noNotesFound.title: No notes found
noNotesFound.body: Try adjusting your search query or category filter.

Workspace.writePlaceholder: Type your notes here exactly as you think them. Write down shopping lists, todo tasks, and meeting summaries mixed up together. No formatting required...
Workspace.anonymousNotice: Anonymous Mode: notes saved to this tab only.
Workspace.trialEndedNotice: Free trial ended. AI organization is disabled. Notes will be saved as plain text.
Workspace.trialEndedHeaderNotice: ⚠️ Your 30-day free trial has ended. AI note organization is no longer available. Notes will be saved as Plain Text.
Workspace.trialActiveNotice: AI formatting is active. Notes will be structured and saved permanently.
Workspace.customTitleTooltip: Custom title — AI won't overwrite this

simplify.label: Simplify
simplify.description: Rewrites the note into simpler terms

custom.label: Ask AI Assistant
custom.description: Submit custom instructions to the AI

Presets.customPlaceholder: e.g. rewrite as a professional email...

Errors.minLength: Note must be at least 10 characters long.
Errors.saveFailed: Failed to save note to backend

Login.title: Sign In
Login.subtitle: Access your notes and let AI organize them

Register.title: Create an Account
Register.subtitle: Join us to organize your messy notes using AI
Register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

deleteNote.title: Delete Note?
deleteNote.body: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.

signOut.title: Sign Out
signOut.body: Are you sure you want to sign out? Any unsaved local changes might be lost.

step1.title: Your notes are messy? Let AI organize them for you.
step1.body: Instantly turn scattered thoughts, lecture records, or meetings into clean, categorized markdown lists.

step2.title: Try it free for 30 days — no card required.
step2.body: Unlock full access to AI note organization for a month. Save notes and access templates with zero commitments.

step3.title: Get Started Now
step3.body: Create a secure account in seconds to save your progress, edit notes, and keep AI organizing them.

Verify.title: Verify your email
Verify.body: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please click the link in that email to confirm your account.
Verify.noSession: No session found. Please try logging in again.
Verify.notVerified: Email is not verified yet. Please check your inbox and click the link.

ForgotPassword.title: Reset Password
ForgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If the email is registered, you will receive a password reset link shortly.

ResetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid, missing, or expired password reset link. Please request a new link.
ResetPassword.tokenMissing: Reset token is missing. Please request a new password reset link.
ResetPassword.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
ResetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successful! You will be redirected to the sign-in page in a few seconds.
ResetPassword.title: Set New Password
ResetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new account password

Settings.title: Account Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your profile details and privacy preferences.
Settings.emailDisabledNotice: Email address updates are disabled. Please contact support to change your account email.
Settings.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversible actions related to your account.
Settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your profile and wipe all associated notes from the database. This action is irreversible.
Settings.dialogBody: Are you absolutely sure? This action is permanent and will immediately delete your profile along with all your saved unstructured notes.

Premium.subtitle: Experience frictionless note-taking. Dump your raw thoughts and let our dual-LLM structure clean, organize, and format them instantly.
Premium.feature1Desc: Simply dump raw meeting recordings, lecture highlights, voice transcripts, or chaotic thoughts. Don't worry about spelling, ordering, or structure—we handle the mess.
Premium.feature2Desc: Powered by a dual-LLM pipeline that cleans up your input. It creates elegant structured markdown with tags, titles, checkable lists, and headers automatically.
Premium.feature3Desc: Easily search, retrieve, and filter note categories. No manual folders needed. Keep your personal workspace beautifully tidy, readable, and lightning fast.
Premium.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of users turning raw information into actionable, structured notes instantly.
